Actions.Text: AMEND AND RECOMMIT TO ECONOMIC DEVELOPMENT
AMEND (T) AND RECOMMIT TO ECONOMIC DEVELOPMENT

Title: Authorizes the office of cannabis management and cannabis control board establish a track and trace program
Summary: Authorizes the office of cannabis management and cannabis control board to establish a track and trace program; requires certain tracking requirements on cannabis sold within the state.
LawCode: Amd §99-ii, St Fin L; amd §78, Cannabis L
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the state finance law, in relation to the usage of funds in the New York state cannabis revenue fund; and to amend the cannabis law, in relation to record keeping and tracking of cannabis
